tribunal_constraint: 720 structure invisible at density level; engine MUST work at spinor level to keep lifted phase (igt-pattern line 165-166).
mechanism_result: Measurement strength IN the loop destroys the lifted-phase interference carrying the 720 structure. Strong measurement (sensing) collapses it; weak/none (intuition) preserves it. This is the well-defined tense signature at spinor level.
per_terrain_status: Mechanism identified (spinor phase, measurement-sensitive) but a clean per-terrain Ne/Ni+ vs Se/Si- realization is NOT yet closed — crude E-operators for Se/Si/Ni at spinor level muddy the split (Ne=1.0 unitary clean; Si renormalization overshoots).
honest_conclusion: Confirms Axis-0 tense is a SPINOR-LEVEL, LOOP-LEVEL, MEASUREMENT-SENSITIVE property (not density-level, not terrain-local) — exactly the tribunal + teeth-map doctrine. Closing the per-terrain split needs principled spinor-level E-operators (measurement models) matched to each terrain's native op, which is the next rung.
why_this_matters: Every prior attempt (11 readouts) worked at DENSITY level, where the 720/tense structure is provably invisible. This is likely WHY all of them collapsed to Axis-1. Moving to spinor level is the structural fix the tribunal already prescribed.
